name: Puzzledorf
short_description: Can you escape the land of puzzles? A vibrant block-pushing game with satisfying solutions, colourful worlds, and relaxing music.
detailed_description:
Stuck in Puzzledorf, the land of puzzles – will you find your way out?

Across multiple, vibrant worlds rendered in nostalgic 80's pixel art, Puzzledorf will challenge your brain while you’re soothed by relaxing melodies.

Inspired by classic block-pushing games from the 80's, Puzzledorf has a gentle learning curve before challenging your mind with delightful, brain-breaking puzzles. Things that look simple at first will surprise you! It takes 5 minutes to learn, and provides hours of gameplay with satisfying puzzles.

A land of bright and colourful places awaits – will you make it out of the lava caverns?

Includes

  • Colourful Worlds: Experience sandy tropical beaches, mysterious purple forests, sliding in ice caverns, and more!

  • Soothing Soundtrack: A relaxing, original soundtrack that blends with each world

  • Sokoban Twist: Match different coloured blocks to coloured targets, a twist on the classic formula

  • Replayability: Steam achievements encourage you to go back and beat your best scores

  • Mirror Mode: flips every puzzle, tricking your brain so you can’t remember the solution

  • Accessibility: no timer, undo unlimited moves, colour blind options

  • Portability: Works on Steam Deck!

  • Cloud Saves: continue the journey wherever you go, crossing between PC and Steam Deck!

Puzzledorf is a fun way to exercise your brain whilst immersing yourself in the vibrant, 2D art. 

What Makes It Unique

Classic Sokoban uses just one block type. In Puzzledorf, there are different coloured blocks that must reach matching coloured targets, and movable boulders that block your path. Moving them around tight spaces creates a unique challenge that sets Puzzledorf apart.

In one puzzle, the blue and green blocks start on opposite sides of a narrow corridor. The solution? A careful swap: shuffling them past each other with almost no room. Clean rules, clever setups, and solutions that just click.


STEAM USER REVIEWS

"I was motivated enough to 100% it. That must say something about the quality, right?" - Lord Victor

"I cannot pin it down but this Sokoban has something." - Thisha

"It unexpectedly pulls you into a world you didn't know you were missing from... A game that calms you and raises your intelligence... It doesn't make you feel stupid; instead, it provides a strange level of clarity, making you instantly feel smarter." - Pweruvian

"This game is amazing! Really enjoying the vibes." - Summoners Drift

"If I were to describe Puzzledorf in one word, it would be 'elegant'." - AP

"Really cute, well done puzzle game, the charm of the graphics style and the super satisfying retro sound effects are great... challenging without being infuriatingly difficult." - Kat

"You will not be disappointed with this little gem of a game." - swcoghlan

STEAM CURATOR REVIEWS

"Charming traditional sokoban game with a great difficulty curve that's been receiving continuous updates for three years. The very definition of a passion project!" - Hidden Indie Gems

"Puzzledorf is full of surprisingly difficult puzzles that will have you scratching your head up until your 'a-ha' moment. So much love went into this game and it shows. Absolute hidden gem!" - Hands-Off Gaming

"Fun, challenging and very addictive Sokoban game, with very relaxing music and a chilled vibe." - Indie Gems

"Puzzledorf, Smoothly blends in tactical and strategic play giving the player full control how to figure out the complex puzzle, plan where you want to place the piece's before you make your move." - Indie Recommendations

"Really clever puzzle game with some really unique mechanics! The art style is cute and retro. The music is fun and funky." - The Indie Game Collective

"Puzzledorf is a very good sokoban game, with smooth mechanics, tantalizing puzzles, enough content to keep you busy for hours, and a great soundtrack that is dreamy and relaxing." - Indie Blast
